Shadow the ostd prelude Result in slab_cache.rs

This fixes the compilatation error of using unreleased two-generic-argument ostd Result.
cc https://github.com/asterinas/asterinas/pull/3036#issuecomment-4167160306

error[E0107]: type alias takes 1 generic argument but 2 generic arguments were supplied
  --> src/slab_cache.rs:45:32
   |
45 |     pub fn alloc(&mut self) -> Result<HeapSlot, AllocError> {
   |                                ^^^^^^         ------------ help: remove the unnecessary generic argument
   |                                |
   |                                expected 1 generic argument

   |

note: type alias defined here, with 1 generic parameter: `T`
  --> /github/home/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-1949cf8c6b5b557f/ostd-0.17.1/src/prelude.rs:8:10
   |
 8 | pub type Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, crate::error::Error>;
   |          ^^^^^^ -

error[E0107]: type alias takes 1 generic argument but 2 generic arguments were supplied
   --> src/lib.rs:150:36
    |
150 |                     as fn(fn()) -> Result<(), Box<dyn Any + Send + 'static>>),
    |                                    ^^^^^^   ------------------------------- help: remove the unnecessary generic argument
    |                                    |
    |                                    expected 1 generic argument
    |

note: type alias defined here, with 1 generic parameter: `T`
   --> /github/home/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-1949cf8c6b5b557f/ostd-0.17.1/src/prelude.rs:8:10

    |
  8 | pub type Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, crate::error::Error>;
    |          ^^^^^^ -
